description: Machine-readable per-package import boundary rules. Loaded by tools/architecture/validate-source-imports. Human-readable companion: import-boundary-rules.md.

packageRules.rationale: UI packages are presentational and data-source agnostic; they must not import domain, contract, or adapter packages.
Contract packages must remain runtime-free; adapters-graphql is the runtime binding.
Contract packages must remain runtime-free.
Contract packages must remain runtime-free; adapters-clickhouse is the analytical persistence runtime.

ADR-0036/0037: contracts-admin is a pure zod contract package. It must remain runtime- and framework-free and must not import adapters, other contracts, domain, or React. Role/provider-id literals are kept in lock-step with domain-identity by review, not by import.
storage-runtime is a leaf interface node with zero @platform/* dependencies.
audit-events is a leaf interface node with zero @platform/* dependencies.
config-runtime is a leaf interface node with zero @platform/* dependencies.
email-runtime is a leaf interface node with zero @platform/* dependencies.

UI packages must not import logging, observability, runtime context, or error packages. ADR-0020 §10: UI components handle display only. Error display uses UI-safe ErrorState primitives, not @platform/platform-errors directly. The @platform/platform-errors prohibition will be revisited once ErrorState is a separately exported type.
Contract packages define data shapes only. ADR-0020: contracts must not depend on concrete logging or observability implementations.
ADR-0020: platform-runtime-context has zero @platform dependencies. It exports types only and must not create any circular or transitive @platform dependency chains.

ADR-0020: platform-errors has zero @platform dependencies. It must be importable by React feature packages for safe client-side error type checks without pulling in any server-side @platform packages.

ADR-0020 §10: platform-observability wraps @opentelemetry/api only — the SDK (sdk-node, auto-instrumentations, exporters, instrumentation-*) is wired exclusively by packages/adapters-opentelemetry at application startup. platform-observability must not import Sentry, platform-logging, adapters, features, domain, or UI.

ADR-0020 §10: platform-logging wraps pino (Node runtime) and a browser-safe console wrapper only. It must not import OpenTelemetry (tracing is separate), Sentry (adapter-only), other adapters, features, domain, contracts, or UI packages.

ADR-0022: Domain packages must not import Keycloak SDK. Keycloak integration is owned exclusively by packages/adapters-keycloak. Note: @platform/adapters-keycloak is already forbidden by no-adapters-in-domain.

ADR-0022: Contract packages define data shapes and DTO schemas only. Keycloak SDK types must not appear in contracts. contracts-auth uses internal session types (SessionActor) not Keycloak claim types.

ADR-0022: The Keycloak adapter must not import React, UI components, or feature packages. It is a server-side adapter only. All Keycloak-React wiring (if ever needed) must go through a separate browser-side adapter, not this package.

ADR-0021: domain-identity is a pure domain package. It must not depend on adapters, HTTP frameworks, logging SDKs, observability SDKs, or React. It receives only typed value objects from platform-runtime-context if needed.

ADR-0022: contracts-auth is a pure contract package (Zod schemas only). It must not import adapters, domain packages, session runtime, logging, or Keycloak SDK. It exports SessionActor, auth request/response shapes, and AuthError subtypes only.

ADR-ACT-0203: the browser GraphQL client converts documents to query strings using only the graphql/language/printer subpath. It must not import the bare `graphql` entry (pulls execution/schema), graphql execution/schema/validation subpaths, server runtime, adapters, or platform-api.

ADR-0022: apps/react-enterprise-app is a browser-only Vite SPA. It must not import Node-only packages, server runtime packages, or database clients. Server/BFF logic belongs in apps/platform-api. ADR-ACT-0203: the SPA must not import graphql/* directly — GraphQL transport goes through @platform/graphql-browser-client and generated operations come from @platform/contracts-graphql. Allowed exceptions: @platform/platform-errors (browser-safe typed errors), @platform/contracts-auth, @platform/contracts-organisation, @platform/contracts-graphql (Zod schemas + generated TypedDocumentNode), @platform/graphql-browser-client, @platform/ui-design-system.
Domain packages must remain pure TypeScript policy/model packages and must not import React or GraphQL runtimes.
Domain packages must remain pure TypeScript policy/model packages and must not import adapters.
Domain packages must not import GraphQL runtimes or generated GraphQL tooling.
Access-control is policy-only and must not import adapters.
Access-control is a server-side policy package and must not import React.
Profile/configuration policy is storage-independent and must not import adapters.
Feature packages compose workflows and must not import runtime adapters directly.
